goal: 修复 FEAT-001 代码审查发现的严重问题：1) ai.ts 添加 google provider 配置 2) useSettings.ts 添加 'google' 类型 3) 补充 playwright.config.ts 4) 清理死代码 5) 补充单元测试缺失项

coverage_checklist.fix_ai_ts_google: assert: src/renderer/services/ai.ts 中 PROVIDER_CONFIGS 包含 google: { apiKeyEnv: 'VITE_GOOGLE_API_KEY' }
coverage_checklist.fix_useSettings_ts_google: assert: src/renderer/hooks/useSettings.ts 中 textProvider 类型包含 'google'
coverage_checklist.playwright_config_exists: assert: scripts/e2e/playwright.config.ts 存在且配置正确
coverage_checklist.dead_code_removed: assert: electron-fixture.ts 中未使用变量 electronPath 已移除
coverage_checklist.fix_main_ai_ts_google: assert: src/main/services/ai.ts 中 PROVIDER_CONFIGS 添加 google 条目
coverage_checklist.constants_test_supplemented: assert: constants.test.ts 新增 Claude Opus 4.7、Claude Haiku 4.5、MiniMax-M1、google/google_vision provider 的验证
coverage_checklist.typecheck_passes: assert: bun run typecheck 通过无错误
